cursor.standing: PROVED for the route + render core, green under the tester with 6 teeth — the nav is the roster, a device page renders its panes pulled live through the heartbeat, an unknown device is a coherent 404 that still renders the nav, every device-derived value is escaped, an absent pane renders its reason, and the web server owns no state.

window.standing: Born as the next step of the code spine after inference_domain, building the web-server ticket cast 2026-07-21 via /sorted; children a (BaseShim pane machinery) and c (ground_loop roster) landed first as the two DATA providers, this device (b, the daemon that renders them) is the third buildable child.

PROVED for the route + render core, green under the tester with 6 teeth — the nav is the roster, a device page renders its panes pulled live through the heartbeat, an unknown device is a coherent 404 that still renders the nav, every device-derived value is escaped, an absent pane renders its reason, and the web server owns no state.
